summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。

raw_articles.title: Will SK Hynix’s Wall Street debut narrow its 'Korea discount'?
raw_articles.summary: As global chip giant SK Hynix makes its Nasdaq debut Friday, the listing serves as a major test of whether the company can shed its long standing "Korea Discount."

raw_articles.title: Robot Dogs, Teslas, and Rescue Helicopters: The UN AI Summit Was a Lot
raw_articles.summary: Amid live coding sessions and Silicon Valley optimism, the UN’s AI for Good summit wrestled with an increasingly urgent question: Can global governance catch up before the technology races beyond its control?

raw_articles.title: GPT-5.6 Is Here: Sol, Terra, and Luna
raw_articles.summary:
For twelve days, the best AI models on the planet existed and almost nobody could touch them. That ends now! GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna go public today! The models are accessible by all users (no subscription required) This is the full breakdown of what’s on offer: three models, four prices, one precedent, and a […]
The post GPT-5.6 Is Here: Sol, Terra, and Luna appeared first on Analytics Vidhya.

raw_articles.title: More Than a Thousand ‘Pokémon Go’ Players Descend on Times Square to Defeat Mewtwo
raw_articles.summary: A surprise 10th-anniversary event saw Niantic fulfilling a promise teased in the original 2016 launch trailer for its popular mobile game.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

raw_articles.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
raw_articles.summary: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric tons "without select interventions." Microsoft says this was "driven primarily by the expansion of our […]

raw_articles.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
raw_articles.summary: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

raw_articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

raw_articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a neuroimmune condition, shortly after she had taken on the […]

raw_articles.title: OpenAI’s CEO of AGI Deployment, Fidji Simo, Is Stepping Down
raw_articles.summary: The move comes after Simo took significant medical leave. She will stay on as a part-time adviser.

raw_articles.title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
raw_articles.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

raw_articles.title: Jim Cramer says investors are making a mistake with the trillion-dollar tech giants
raw_articles.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that investors are making a mistake when comparing all the "Magnificent Seven" companies when they all have vastly different businesses.

raw_articles.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
raw_articles.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
